title: AI Software Engineer
description:
Position: AI Software Engineer

Working Hours: US Business Hours

Hiring Company: We are a 10 year old remote staffing
business with a fully remote team of 100+ employees. We
started as a customer service agency, but have leveraged our
client experience and technical acumen to become the
industry's first AI empowered (human) virtual assistant
service.

About the Role: We’re seeking an AI Software Engineer to
build a multi-agent system that integrates AI Agents into
business teams. You’ll work directly with our CEO (a highly
technical domain expert, but non-coder) to turn a clear
vision and technical spec into a live system. This is a
strategic project to be spun out of a 10-year-old remote
staffing business with over 100 clients—giving us the
ability to innovate with you and the ability to invest in
growth at launch.

Key Responsibilities:

- Planning‬‭ - Collaborate to translate vision and initial
  technical specs into a development plan that you are
  confident in building.‬
- ‭ Decisions‬‭ - As part of developing the plan, make
  architecture and strategy decisions that may need to
  change from initial spec.‬
- ‭ Process‬‭ - Execute best practice development process
  against the plan, leveraging your development experience‬‭
  and‬‭ AI coding.‬
- ‭ Collaboration‬‭ - You will be primarily building, but
  collaboration on product strategy and project management
  will be important.‬

Requirements

‬

Experience based: ( * are required)‬

- * Strong programming skills (without AI) - real-world
  experience writing and shipping production code
- ‭* Deep experience with AI-powered software development -
  primarily using Cursor in a systematic and scalable way.‬
- * Technical experience building on OpenAI APIs and multi
  agent SDKs (CrewAI, Vercel, and recently OpenAI Agents
  SDK).‬
- Experience working with cross functional cofounding teams -
  including non coders that are involved in technical work.‬
- Proven ability to build for short‬‭ AND long term - high-
  leverage, modular systems, balancing technical debt vs
  momentum.‬

‭ Mindset based:‬

- ‬All In on AI Development - you already build with AI, and
  you’re pushing the edges of what’s possible.‬
- You Know The AI Space - You’re listening to AI podcasts and
  are active on X, testing and applying new insights
  regularly.‬
- Obsessively Innovating with AI - always refining how you use
  AI tools to reduce friction and increase quality.‬
- Curious and Optimistic - You approach novel problems and new
  technology with excitement, not skepticism.‬
- Entrepreneurial - You love building, but you love seeing
  what you’ve built drive results. You thrive in the fast-
  moving‬ startup environment and get energy from the grind
  of building something quickly.‬

Benefits

This is a 3 month contract role, with the opportunity to
move to full time employment in the future.

Notes:

Our CEO will be heavily involved in hiring, with the support
of our recruitment team. Please expect communication from
multiple parties.
responsibilities: Collaborate to translate vision and initial technical specs into a development plan
Make architecture and strategy decisions that may need to change from initial spec
Execute best practice development process against the plan using development experience and AI coding
Build primarily while collaborating on product strategy and project management
Design high-leverage, modular systems balancing technical debt vs momentum for short and long term success
use_cases: Building multi-agent systems that integrate AI Agents into business teams
Creating AI-empowered virtual assistant services for clients
Deploying AI solutions that augment human virtual assistants in customer service contexts
Implementing agent-based systems to automate and enhance business workflows
Developing AI-powered tools that integrate with existing remote staffing operations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building a multi-agent system using
OpenAI Agents SDK, CrewAI, and other AI frameworks. The
engineer will directly work on implementing AI agents,
integrating AI APIs, and deploying AI-powered solutions,
which aligns with ai-first classification.
